AboutPage.title: About Me
AboutPage.welcome: Welcome to {siteTitle}! This is where I share technical insights, development experiences, and life reflections.
AboutPage.techStackDescription: This blog is built with the following modern tech stack:
AboutPage.openSourceLibrariesDescription: Main open source libraries and frameworks used in the project

openSourceLibrariesDetail.description: Open source libraries used in the project tech stack with official documentation

libraries.react: Declarative JavaScript library for building user interfaces with component-based development and virtual DOM optimization
libraries.nextjs: Full-stack React framework with SSR, SSG optimization, file-based routing and API routes
libraries.typescript: Superset of JavaScript that adds static type checking for better development experience and code quality
libraries.tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building modern responsive interfaces with atomic classes
libraries.postcss: CSS post-processor for transforming and optimizing CSS code with plugin support
libraries.tailwindAnimate: Plugin that provides preset animation classes for Tailwind CSS to simplify animation development
libraries.framerMotion: Powerful React animation library with declarative animation API and gesture support
libraries.emotion: High-performance CSS-in-JS library with support for styled components and dynamic styles
libraries.contentlayer: Content SDK that transforms Markdown, MDX content into type-safe data layer
libraries.mdx: Enhanced version of Markdown that supports JSX components in Markdown
libraries.grayMatter: Parse frontmatter metadata from Markdown files
libraries.nextIntl: Internationalization solution for Next.js with multi-language routing and translation support
libraries.fuse: Lightweight fuzzy search library with fast search and ranking algorithms
libraries.clsx: Concise conditional classname utility for dynamically composing CSS class names
libraries.useDebounce: React debounce hooks library for optimizing input and search performance
libraries.eslint: Extensible JavaScript linting tool for finding and fixing code issues
libraries.prettier: Code formatter that ensures code style consistency
libraries.husky: Git hooks tool that automatically runs scripts before commits
libraries.lintStaged: Run linters on Git staged files to improve commit quality
libraries.openai: Official OpenAI SDK for integrating ChatGPT and other AI features

AboutPage.reactDescription: JavaScript library for building user interfaces
AboutPage.typescriptDescription: Language that adds type system to JavaScript
AboutPage.onlineServicesDescription: Online services used for project deployment and maintenance

onlineServicesDetail.description: Online service platforms for project deployment, hosting and monitoring

services.vercel: Modern frontend deployment platform with automated builds, preview deployments and global CDN acceleration
services.godaddyDomain: Domain registration and management service provided by GoDaddy, offering reliable DNS resolution and domain management features for this website
services.searchConsole: Google search optimization tool to monitor website performance and indexing status in search results
services.godaddy: GoDaddy website analytics tool providing domain management and website traffic monitoring features
services.github: World's largest code hosting platform with version control, collaborative development and CI/CD features
services.githubActions: GitHub's automated CI/CD platform for building, testing and deploying code workflows

AboutPage.developmentProtocolsDescription: International standards and protocol specifications followed by this site

protocolsDetail.title: Followed International Protocols
protocolsDetail.description: This site strictly adheres to the following international standards and protocols, ensuring website accessibility, security, and interoperability

wcag.name: WCAG 2.1
wcag.description: International web accessibility standard by W3C, ensuring website content is accessible to all users, including people with disabilities

ccLicense.name: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
ccLicense.description: Internationally recognized content licensing protocol allowing sharing and modification for non-commercial purposes

https.name: HTTPS/TLS 1.3
https.fullName: Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure / Transport Layer Security
https.description: International standard protocol for secure internet communication, ensuring encrypted and integrity-protected data transmission

opengraph.name: Open Graph Protocol
opengraph.description: Social media metadata standard by Facebook, optimizing content display on social platforms

schema.name: Schema.org
schema.description: Structured data standard by Google, Microsoft, Yahoo, and others, improving search engine understanding

rss.name: RSS 2.0 / Atom
rss.description: Standardized content aggregation and subscription formats, allowing users to subscribe via RSS readers

html5.name: Semantic HTML5
html5.description: Modern web markup standard by W3C, using semantic tags to improve accessibility and SEO

restful.name: RESTful API
restful.description: HTTP-based API design architectural style, providing standardized web service interface design principles

AboutPage.securityDescription: Development practices to ensure project security
AboutPage.personalProfileDescription: A technology enthusiast developer who loves exploring new technologies, enjoys the fun of programming, and is committed to creating interesting projects.
AboutPage.personalProfileDetailSubtitle: Detailed personal information and contact details
AboutPage.personalProfileDetail1: I am a technology enthusiast developer, focusing on frontend technologies and full-stack development. I love exploring new technology stacks including React, Next.js, TypeScript, etc. I am passionate about learning new technologies and enjoy sharing interesting technical discoveries and programming insights through my blog.
AboutPage.personalProfileDetail2: I usually enjoy studying new technologies, participating in open source projects, and sharing learning insights through technical blogs. I believe technology can make life better and love using code to solve practical problems and create interesting digital experiences.

Skills.title: Skills & Expertise
Skills.subtitle: Technical skills and professional capabilities details

techDescriptions.React: Modern frontend framework, excels at building interactive user interfaces with component-based development and virtual DOM optimization
techDescriptions.Vue: Progressive JavaScript framework, easy to learn and use, suitable for rapid single-page application development
techDescriptions.NextJS: Full-stack React framework providing SSR, SSG optimizations to enhance application performance
techDescriptions.HTML5: Modern web markup language, offering rich semantic tags and multimedia support
techDescriptions.CSS3: Stylesheet language supporting animations, responsive design, and modern layout techniques
techDescriptions.Vite: Fast frontend build tool providing hot reload and optimized development experience
techDescriptions.Tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework, rapidly building modern interfaces through atomic classes
techDescriptions.Magento: Enterprise-grade e-commerce platform, supporting large-scale online store development and management
techDescriptions.Catalyst: High-performance frontend framework focused on building fast-responsive user interfaces
techDescriptions.ES6: Modern version of JavaScript, providing arrow functions, modules, and other new features
techDescriptions.JavaScript: Dynamic programming language, core technology for frontend development
techDescriptions.TypeScript: JavaScript superset with type system, providing better development experience and code quality
techDescriptions.NodeJS: JavaScript runtime based on Chrome V8 engine, used for server-side development
techDescriptions.PostgreSQL: Powerful open-source relational database supporting complex queries and data integrity
techDescriptions.RESTful: REST architectural style API design, providing standardized web service interfaces
techDescriptions.GraphQL: Query language and runtime, providing flexible and efficient data query methods
techDescriptions.Git: Distributed version control system, managing code versions and team collaboration
techDescriptions.Docker: Containerization platform, simplifying application deployment and environment management
techDescriptions.VSCode: Lightweight code editor providing rich plugins and debugging features
techDescriptions.Cursor: AI-powered code editor, enhancing programming efficiency and code quality
techDescriptions.ChatGPT: AI assistant tool, assisting with code writing, problem solving, and knowledge acquisition
techDescriptions.Figma: Collaborative design tool for UI/UX design and prototyping
techDescriptions.SFSymbol: Apple system icon library, providing consistent icon design language

Policies.title: Policies
Policies.description: Learn about our terms of service, privacy policy, and security policy
Policies.termsSection1Content: This website provides technical blog content sharing services. Users can browse, read, and share technical articles through this website. We reserve the right to modify or terminate the service at any time.
Policies.termsSection2Content: When using this service, users must comply with relevant laws and regulations and must not publish illegal, harmful, threatening, defamatory, privacy-invading, or intellectual property-infringing information. Users are fully responsible for the content they publish.
Policies.termsSection3Content: The information provided on this website is for reference only and does not constitute any form of advice. We are not responsible for any losses incurred by users due to the use of information from this website.
Policies.privacySection1Content: We may collect basic information when you visit this website, including IP address, browser type, access time, etc. This information is only used to improve website performance and user experience.
Policies.privacySection2Content: The collected information will be used for analyzing website usage, optimizing content display, providing personalized services, and other purposes. We will not sell your personal information to third parties.
Policies.privacySection3Content: We adopt appropriate technical and administrative measures to protect your personal information security and prevent unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.
Policies.securitySection1Content: We use HTTPS encryption transmission, regular security updates, access control, and other security measures to protect website and user data security.
Policies.securitySection2Content: We regularly backup important data to ensure quick service recovery in case of unexpected situations and minimize data loss risks.
Policies.securitySection3Content: We continuously monitor website security status, promptly discover and handle potential security threats to ensure stable service operation.
Policies.contactDescription: If you have any questions or suggestions about these policies, please contact us through the website contact information.

Education.briefTitle: Chengdu University of Technology (Yibin Campus) · IoT Engineering
Education.briefDescription: Focused on Web track: frontend engineering, database & API design, full‑stack development and deployment.
Education.detailSummary: Primarily Web/full‑stack oriented: learned frontend engineering, modern frameworks and state management, API and database design, performance optimization, and deployment/operations to deliver end‑to‑end solutions.
Education.achievement2: National Champion, China Computer Game Competition · Einstein Chess

DevelopmentHistory.sectionDescription: Complete development journey from blog 1.0 to 2.0, including detailed feature evolution of each version
DevelopmentHistory.blog1Description: Initial version, Vue3 + Vite pure static webpage, deployed on GitHub Pages
DevelopmentHistory.blog1DescriptionDetail: The initial version of the blog, built with Vue3 + Vite, deployed on GitHub Pages as a pure static webpage. Construction started in September 2023, officially launched in February 2024, and the first article was updated in March 2024.
DevelopmentHistory.blog1DomainNote: Original domain: http://carloss2035.com/, now inaccessible due to domain issues. This version has been discontinued.
DevelopmentHistory.blog2Description: Complete refactoring with Next.js + TypeScript modern architecture
DevelopmentHistory.blog2DescriptionDetail: Complete refactored version of the blog, built with Next.js + TypeScript + Contentlayer modern architecture. Construction started in September 2025, officially launched in October 2025, first article updated in October 2025, with ongoing maintenance and updates.
DevelopmentHistory.blog2ImprovementNote: Compared to version 1.0, achieved major improvements including tech stack upgrade, internationalization support, advanced SEO optimization, and significant performance improvements.
DevelopmentHistory.majorVersionsDesc: Technology evolution from Vue3 to Next.js
DevelopmentHistory.languageSupportDesc: Multi-language support for Chinese, English, and Japanese

versions.v200Description: Complete migration from Vue3 to Next.js, refactoring the entire project with TypeScript and adopting modern tech stack and development patterns.
versions.v201Description: Blog officially launched, integrated Contentlayer content management system, MDX support, and published first article.
versions.v210Description: Enhanced multi-language support, implemented content display and switching experience for Chinese, English, and Japanese, supporting full-site internationalization.
versions.v220Description: Comprehensive SEO optimization, improving search engine rankings and website discoverability, continuous performance and user experience improvements.
